step_rationale: OXE-R-dependent effector providing myocardial protection and limiting infarction extent.
mechanism: BCAT1 (branched-chain amino-acid aminotransferase 1) mediates OXE-R-driven cardioprotection, reducing myocardial ischemic injury in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Oxoeicosanoid receptor inhibition alleviates acute myocardial infarction through activation of BCAT1.
